name: New Client Requirement
subject: New requirement: {{ doc.title }}
message: A new client requirement **{{ doc.title }}** is open. Client: {{ doc.client or 'n/a' }} | Skill: {{ doc.primary_skill or 'n/a' }} | Location: {{ doc.location or 'n/a' }}.

name: Interview Scheduled
subject: Interview scheduled: {{ doc.consultant }}
message: Interview scheduled for **{{ doc.consultant }}** on requirement {{ doc.requirement }}.

name: Consultant Now On Bench
subject: On bench: {{ doc.employee_name }}
message: **{{ doc.employee_name }}** is now on the bench. Primary skill: {{ doc.primary_skill or 'n/a' }} | Available: {{ doc.availability_date or 'now' }}.
